final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed oriental fragrance brand.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity system reference sheet, refined East-Asian typographic sensibility in the spirit of Nendo or Muji brand manuals
Composition: portrait layout, three clearly labeled sections stacked vertically — primary color swatches row, secondary/accent color swatches row, and typography specimen panel; generous white space between sections
Subject: brand identity system for 染秋 (RAN QIU) — an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Chinese dyeing craft aesthetics and Eastern philosophy; hero scent ingredients include osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, oolong tea, cinnamon, sandalwood, and amber
Scene/backdrop: off-white or warm cream paper-texture background evoking handmade washi; no photographic scene
Lighting/mood: flat, even, diffused light; no shadows; calm and meditative mood
Color palette: primary colors drawn from deep autumn — burnt sienna (枫叶红), persimmon orange (柿霜橙), osmanthus gold (桂花金); secondary/accent colors include oolong brown (乌龙棕), sandalwood beige (檀香米), amber resin (琥珀深褐), muted sage (秋草绿); each swatch labeled with Chinese name + English name + hex code
Materials/textures: matte ink-on-paper feel; subtle washi fiber texture on background only; swatches rendered as flat rectangles with soft rounded corners
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", "染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭"
Constraints: all color swatches must be clearly legible with hex codes; typography section must show at least one serif/brush-style CJK typeface specimen and one clean sans-serif CJK specimen; layout must read as a formal brand guideline reference card
Avoid: photorealistic autumn scenery; gradient blobs; neon or oversaturated colors; Western-only typefaces without CJK counterpart; cluttered decorative borders; watermarks
